01 — Profile

Design Storytelling
Through Precision

A senior architectural visualizer with 15 years of experience bringing design concepts to life through photorealistic CGI. Working in close collaboration with architects and designers — translating sketches and ideas into imagery that tells the story of a place before it is built.

Experience spans luxury residential, commercial interiors, large-scale masterplans, healthcare, hospitality and immersive walkthrough productions across Saudi Arabia, Bahrain, and international markets.

Currently contributing to a Vision 2030 giga-project (NEOM Trojena) at Robert Bird Group, with a proven track record of AI-enhanced production tools deployed on Jeddah Tower.

04 — Innovation

AI at the
Frontier of Build

Skybuilder — AI Construction Sequencing Tool
Google Gemini · Jeddah Tower · 4D Workflow

Developed an AI-assisted scripting tool using the Google Gemini API that automates and enhances 4D construction sequencing workflows. The tool was adopted in the construction sequencing test phase of the Jeddah Tower project — demonstrating initiative in applying emerging AI to complex real-world build workflows at the very frontier of architecture and technology.

The Problem
4D construction sequencing for supertall structures involves thousands of interdependent build phases. Manually storyboarding sequence logic for stakeholders is time-intensive and error-prone.
The Solution
Skybuilder uses Google Gemini's reasoning to intelligently generate, order, and visualize construction sequences — reducing time to stakeholder-ready output and improving 4D narrative clarity.
The Outcome
Adopted on Jeddah Tower. Bridges visualization, BIM, and construction management — a model for AI-augmented CGI production beyond traditional rendering.
